name: Real Beastars RPG
description:
NEW BOT!!! Welcome to Cherryton Academy.

Based on the original Beastars manga—raw, psychological, uncompromising.
Every interaction matters. Every instinct is a battle. Every choice has consequences.


You're a first-year, two weeks late. Everyone else has already found their place.
Navigate complex social hierarchies, suppress primal urges, and survive in a society built on fragile coexistence.
creator: SatanLover
